notes:
Batch D file-by-file rationale:
- ai/agent/util.rs (6): lines 19/20/23/26/27 are `///` doc comments captured inside lazy_static! macro body (extractor_false_positive_doc_comment); line 21 is `.expect("Regex is valid")` → panic_message.
- ai/blocklist/task_status_sync_model.rs (7): all are TaskStatusUpdate::message / with_error_code strings flowing into AgentTaskState UI surface — translated. Brand literals AWS Bedrock / API / PR kept English; placeholders {model_name},{msg},{provider},{blocked_action} preserved.
- auth/login_failure_notification.rs (6): all are FormattedTextFragment::plain_text in a user-facing login-failure notification panel — translated; leading space on " Not the first time? See our " preserved.
- autoupdate/mac.rs (10): all are safe_info!/safe_error!/log::* literals or .context(...) attached to anyhow errors that flow through report_error! → log::log + sentry::capture_error — telemetry_payload. Confirmed by reading crates/warp_core/src/safe_log.rs (safe_* wrap log::*) and crates/warp_core/src/errors.rs (report_error logs to LOG_TARGET and captures to Sentry).
- code_review/git_dialog/commit.rs (9): all are show_toast / Text::new label / button label / placeholder text for the commit dialog UI — translated. "…" preserved as U+2026 (Committing\u{2026}).
- search/command_search/view.rs (7): line 788 is `.expect("View handle should upgradeable.")` → panic_message; lines 517/518/522/523/1003 are AccessibilityContent strings (screen-reader UI) — translated; line 618 is render_error_header_text — translated.
- tab_configs/new_worktree_modal.rs (6): section labels, modal title, checkbox label, validation error — all UI, translated. Glossary: worktree kept English (technical git term, no glossary entry).
- terminal/view/inline_banner/shared_sessions.rs (6): all six are banner labels rendered into inline banner UI — translated.
- crates/warpui/examples/resizable/root_view.rs (6): Text::new_inline labels and panel content strings rendered as actual UI in a runnable example binary — translated as regular UI text (not test fixture; these render to a window).
Total: 63 entries → 46 translated, 17 flagged, 0 bilingual.
